basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur (AIIMS Jodhpur) Project Technical Support II Notification 2026 has been released on the official website aiimsjodhpur.edu.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation of up to 5 years may be granted to deserving candidates with experience in a Government Research Organisation on ICMR projects, on a case-by-case basis, as per ICMR Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th in Science + Diploma + Five Years Experience in relevant subject / field, Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years experience in relevant subject, MPH (Desirable)
qualification.details: 12th in Science + Diploma + Five Years Experience in relevant subject / field OR Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years experience in relevant subject (Relevant Subject / field: Medical Social Work / Sociology / Clinical Psychology / Medical Anthropology / Women Studies / Public Health / Nursing / any relevant health-related discipline / Equivalent) MPH (Desirable)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Jodhpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: 12th in Science + Diploma + Five Years Experience in relevant subject / field OR Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years experience in relevant subject (Relevant Subject / field: Medical Social Work / Sociology / Clinical Psychology / Medical Anthropology / Women Studies / Public Health / Nursing / any relevant health-related discipline / Equivalent) MPH (Desirable)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation of up to 5 years may be granted to deserving candidates with experience in a Government Research Organisation on ICMR projects, on a case-by-case basis, as per ICMR Rules.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Jodhpur Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the AIIMS Jodhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Project Technical Support II at AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Technical Support II position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is through a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held on 30th July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support II?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have 12th in Science with a Diploma and five years of experience, or a three-year Graduate degree with two years of experience in a relevant field.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 30 years, with possible relaxation for deserving candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support II position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is between Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 24,000 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category.

faq.question: Q9. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at the Department of Community Medicine & Family Medicine, 2nd Floor, College Building, Gate 5, AIIMS Jodhpur.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.
